title: Synthetic potentiality of α-amino nitrones as oxidizing reagent in the conversion of alkyl halides to aldehydes
author: Bhaskar Chakraborty
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Organic Chemistry Laboratory, Sikkim Government College, Gangtok-737 102, Sikkim, India 
 E-mail;  bhaskargtk@yahoo.com 
 Manuscript received 26 May 2009, revised 6 April 2010, accepted 17 May 2010  

 α-Amino nitrones have been used successfully as an oxidizing reagent for the synthesis or aldehydes from 
various alkyl halides with an excellent yield. In addition, hydrolylis of the side product (imines) furnisher starting material 
amides which are recyclable along with corresponding amines.
